title: Musical Birthday Candles – 3-Pack Lotus Flower Candles with Music & Spinning Bloom – Assorted Colors, Perfect for Cakes, Birthdays & Parties
features: Unique candle design: The Birthday Candle Music with Lotus Opening is a specially designed candle that opens up like a blooming lotus flower as it plays music.
Fun and festive: The candle is perfect for birthday parties and other celebrations, adding an extra layer of fun and excitement to the festivities.
Plays happy birthday song: The candle plays the classic "Happy Birthday" song as it opens up, creating a festive and memorable moment.
Shape : lotus flower birthday candle for anyone who loves to celebrate birthdays and other special occasions.
Easy to use: Simply light the candle and wait for it to begin playing music and opening up like a lotus flower. The candle is easy to use and requires no special skills or tools.
description: Product Description Presenting KARRMA Musical Birthday Candle, Comes in Pack of 3 in Lotus Flower Shaped. Comes in assorted colour. These floral scented candles are also perfect for Decoration, Available in Yellow, Orange, Blue, Pink, Purple or White colours. Each candle measures 12cm. Candle will rotate round and sing 'Happy Birthday' tune once lit. Very convenient and easy to use. These Modern Party Candles are perfect for birthday parties, Cake Topper, and other Parties and occasion celebration. KARRMA Birthday Candle comes with Built-in battery so you don't need to install a battery. Flowers would open and rotate. Very Convenient to Use :- These candles are very convenient and easy to use. Just lit up and used as a cake topper or birthday candle or decoration. Candle will rotate round and sing 'Happy Birthday' tune once lit. Please remember lit up the center of the candle, otherwise the leaves may not open and there will be no music at all. Colourful Lotus Shaped :- KARRMA musical lotus flower shaped birthday candles will definitely surprise the crowd when romantic happy birthday music plays. Comes as a pack of 3 in assorted Colour from Yellow, Orange, Blue, Pink, Purple or White colours. Great As a Gifts :- The KARRMA beautiful, colourful and modern musical birthday candles are the perfect gift to bring lovers, friends and yourself a warm and romantic birthday party. The colors match randomly, Single use, cannot be reused. Multi Way Applicable :- Bring some fun to any party and celebrate the cake with this singing, rotating flower candle. These candles are perfect for birthday parties, seasonal parties or events, frozen themed parties, decorating events at halls, restaurants, clubs, hotels and at home. Premium Quality Material :- KARRMA lotus flower shaped birthday candles that will bring cheers to everyone at the party. Made from High quality premium plastic material with paraffin wax. Also Perfect for Christmas, Easter, Weddings, Religious Activities, Other Parties.
